name: BTF100Z Fresnel Zoom 100W LED White 3200K

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: A022B315-544B-4BA1-B495-937F8B2A663B

comment:
BTF100Z Fresnel Zoom 100W LED White 3200K
The BeamZ BTF100Z Fresnel Zoom uses a high power single source LED engine to provide a smooth and even field of warm white light, providing a modern replacement for traditional fresnels. The BTF100Z is equipped with high-quality optics, a motorized 25-65 degree zoom function and is both dimmable and able to be operated as a strobe up to 20 flashes per second. Ideal for use in theatres, studios or any stage setting that requires smooth warm white output from an energy saving fixture with exceptionally long life. Features Powerconnector in&out and DMX controllability. Supplied with barn doors for beam shaping and glare reduction, safety cord and colour frame.
